revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: ''''太歳神'''（たいさいしん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）のひとり。[[暦]]本によっては'''だい...'
revision.text:
'''太歳神'''（たいさいしん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）のひとり。[[暦]]本によっては'''だいさい'''・'''太さい'''と書くものもある。同じ八将神の一人である[[太陰神]]の夫ともされ、[[仏教]]における[[本地仏]]は[[薬師如来]]とされる。
太歳神は、[[木星]]（歳星）の精とされ、1年の[[四季]]において万物の生成をつかさどるという。また、[[君主]]的な立場にあり、八方に影響力を持つとされる。木星の精とされることから、[[樹木]]や[[草]]に関する性格を持っており、太歳神の位置する方位に向かって、樹木や草木等を植えつけることなどは吉であるが、樹木の伐採や草刈りなどは凶とされる。また、君主的な立場にある神であることから、争いごと（[[訴訟]]や談判など）や[[葬儀]]・[[解体]]などは疫災にあうとされるが、[[貯蓄]]や[[家屋]]の[[建築]]や[[リフォーム|増改築]]、[[移転]]、[[商取引]]、[[結婚]]、[[就職]]などは大吉とされる。
太歳神の在位する方角は、その歳の十二支の方位と同じ方角となる。
==関連項目== *[[方位神]] *[[八将神]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:たいさいしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] {{stub}}

'''太歳神'''（たいさいしん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）のひとり。[[暦]]本によっては'''だいさい'''・'''太さい'''と書くものもある。同じ八将神の一人である[[太陰神]]の夫ともされ、[[仏教]]における[[本地仏]]は[[薬師如来]]とされる。
太歳神は、[[木星]]（歳星）の精とされ、1年の[[四季]]において万物の生成をつかさどるという。また、[[君主]]的な立場にあり、八方に影響力を持つとされる。木星の精とされることから、[[樹木]]や[[草]]に関する性格を持っており、太歳神の位置する方位に向かって、樹木や草木等を植えつけることなどは吉であるが、樹木の伐採や草刈りなどは凶とされる。また、君主的な立場にある神であることから、争いごと（[[訴訟]]や談判など）や[[葬儀]]・[[解体]]などは疫災にあうとされるが、[[貯蓄]]や[[家屋]]の[[建築]]や[[リフォーム|増改築]]、[[引越し|移転]]、[[商取引]]、[[結婚]]、[[就職]]などは大吉とされる。
太歳神の在位する方角は、その歳の十二支の方位と同じ方角となる。
==関連項目== *[[方位神]] *[[八将神]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:たいさいしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] {{stub}}

太歳神は、[[木星]]（歳星）の精とされ、1年の[[四季]]において万物の生成をつかさどるという。また、[[君主]]的な立場にあり、八方に影響力を持つとされる。木星の精とされることから、[[樹木]]や[[草]]に関する性格を持っており、太歳神の位置する方位に向かって、樹木や草木等を植えつけることなどは吉であるが、樹木の伐採や[[草刈り]]などは凶とされる。また、君主的な立場にある神であることから、争いごと（[[訴訟]]や談判など）や[[葬儀]]・[[解体]]などは疫災にあうとされるが、[[貯蓄]]や[[家屋]]の[[建築]]や[[リフォーム|増改築]]、[[引越し|移転]]、[[商取引]]、[[結婚]]、[[就職]]などは大吉とされる。
太歳神の在位する[[方位|方角]]は、その歳の[[十二支]]の方位と同じ方角となる。
==関連項目== *[[方位神]] *[[八将神]] *[[太歳星君]]
{{Japan-culture-stub}} {{Myth-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:たいさいしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] [[Category:木星神]]

{{Otheruses|陰陽道における太歳神|[[日本神話]]、[[神道]]の神|歳神}} [[画像:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|太歳神]] '''太歳神'''（たいさいしん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）のひとり。[[暦]]本によっては'''だいさい'''・'''太さい'''と書くものもある。同じ八将神の一人である[[太陰神]]の夫ともされ、[[仏教]]における[[本地仏]]は[[薬師如来]]とされる。
太歳神は、[[木星]]（歳星）の精とされ、1年の[[四季]]において万物の生成をつかさどるという。また、[[君主]]的な立場にあり、八方に影響力を持つとされる。木星の精とされることから、[[樹木]]や[[草]]に関する性格を持っており、太歳神の位置する方位に向かって、樹木や草木等を植えつけることなどは吉であるが、樹木の伐採や[[草刈り]]などは凶とされる。また、君主的な立場にある神であることから、争いごと（[[訴訟]]や談判など）や[[葬儀]]・[[解体]]などは疫災にあうとされるが、[[貯蓄]]や[[家屋]]の[[建築]]や[[リフォーム|増改築]]、[[引越し|移転]]、[[商取引]]、[[結婚]]、[[就職]]などは大吉とされる。
太歳神の在位する[[方位|方角]]は、その歳の[[十二支]]の方位と同じ方角となる。
また、太歳は中国の紀年法においても時間単位に相当する意味があり、「六十甲子」は紀年、紀月、紀日、紀時の紀年法であり、太歳は六十甲子紀年法の運転周期であり、道教信仰の中で六十甲子太歳に神格化され、全部で六十人の太歳神がおり、一年ごとに入れ替わると、「値年太歳」と呼ばれ、この時間を司るため、「太歳」は時には時間単位を意味することもある。<ref>歳星紀年法木星が天体の中で運行する法則に基づいて紀年する方法で、毎年1人の太歳神がいます</ref>
==関連項目== *[[方位神]] *[[八将神]] *[[太歳星君]]
{{Japan-culture-stub}} {{Myth-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:たいさいしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] [[Category:木星神]]

{{Otheruses|陰陽道における太歳神|[[日本神話]]、[[神道]]の神|歳神}} [[画像:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|太歳神]] '''太歳神'''（たいさいしん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）のひとり。[[暦]]本によっては'''だいさい'''・'''太さい'''と書くものもある。同じ八将神の一人である[[太陰神]]の夫ともされ、[[仏教]]における[[本地仏]]は[[薬師如来]]とされる。
太歳神は、[[木星]]（歳星）の精とされ、1年の[[四季]]において万物の生成をつかさどるという。また、[[君主]]的な立場にあり、八方に影響力を持つとされる。木星の精とされることから、[[樹木]]や[[草]]に関する性格を持っており、太歳神の位置する方位に向かって、樹木や草木等を植えつけることなどは吉であるが、樹木の伐採や[[草刈り]]などは凶とされる。また、君主的な立場にある神であることから、争いごと（[[訴訟]]や談判など）や[[葬儀]]・[[解体]]などは疫災にあうとされるが、[[貯蓄]]や[[家屋]]の[[建築]]や[[リフォーム|増改築]]、[[引越し|移転]]、[[商取引]]、[[結婚]]、[[就職]]などは大吉とされる。
太歳神の在位する[[方位|方角]]は、その歳の[[十二支]]の方位と同じ方角となる。
太歳は方位神と星神（太歳は仮想天体）。
また、太歳は中国の紀年法においても時間単位に相当する意味があり、「六十甲子」は紀年、紀月、紀日、紀時の紀年法であり、太歳は六十甲子紀年法の運転周期であり、道教信仰の中で六十甲子太歳に神格化され、全部で六十人の太歳神がおり、一年ごとに入れ替わると、「値年太歳」と呼ばれ、この時間を司るため、「太歳」は時には時間単位を意味することもある。<ref>歳星紀年法木星が天体の中で運行する法則に基づいて紀年する方法で、毎年1人の太歳神がいます</ref>

{{Otheruses|Taishōjin in Onmyōdō|the deity in [[Japanese mythology]] and [[Shinto]]|[[Toshigami]]}} [[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]] '''Taishōjin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taishōjin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} (spiritual essence) of Taishōjin is identified as {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}}.
Taishōjin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taishōjin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taishōjin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|trees|ja|樹木}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taishōjin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.
As a sovereign deity, disputes such as {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as {{ill|savings|ja|貯蓄}}, {{ill|construction|ja|建築}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.
The direction of Taishōjin corresponds to the position of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} for the respective year.
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Directional Deity|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} * {{ill|Tai Sui Xingjun|ja|太歳星君}}

{{Otheruses|Taishōjin in Onmyōdō|the deity in [[Japanese mythology]] and [[Shinto]]|[[Toshigami}} [[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]] '''Taishōjin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taishōjin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} (spiritual essence) of Taishōjin is identified as {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}}.
Taishōjin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taishōjin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taishōjin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|trees|ja|樹木}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taishōjin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.
As a sovereign deity, disputes such as {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as {{ill|savings|ja|貯蓄}}, {{ill|construction|ja|建築}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.
The direction of Taishōjin corresponds to the position of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} for the respective year.
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Directional Deity|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} * {{ill|Tai Sui Xingjun|ja|太歳星君}}

revision.text:
[[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]]
'''Taishōjin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taishōjin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} (spiritual essence) of Taishōjin is identified as {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}}.
Taishōjin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taishōjin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taishōjin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|trees|ja|樹木}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taishōjin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.
As a sovereign deity, disputes such as {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as {{ill|savings|ja|貯蓄}}, {{ill|construction|ja|建築}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.
The direction of Taishōjin corresponds to the position of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} for the respective year.
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Directional Deity|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} * {{ill|Yin Jiao (deity)|ja|太歳星君}}

revision.text:
[[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]]
'''Taishōjin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taishōjin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} (spiritual essence) of Taishōjin is identified as {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}}.
Taishōjin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taishōjin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taishōjin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|trees|ja|樹木}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taishōjin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.
As a sovereign deity, disputes such as {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as {{ill|savings|ja|貯蓄}}, {{ill|construction|ja|建築}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.
The direction of Taishōjin corresponds to the position of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} for the respective year.
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Directional Deity|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} * {{ill|Yin Jiao (deity)|ja|太歳星君}}

revision.text:
[[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]]
'''Taishōjin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taishōjin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} (spiritual essence) of Taishōjin is identified as {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}}.
Taishōjin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taishōjin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taishōjin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|trees|ja|樹木}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taishōjin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.
As a sovereign deity, disputes such as {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as {{ill|savings|ja|貯蓄}}, {{ill|construction|ja|建築}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.
The direction of Taishōjin corresponds to the position of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} for the respective year.
== See Also == * {{ill|Directional Deity|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} * {{ill|Yin Jiao (deity)|ja|太歳星君}}

revision.text:
[[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]]
'''Taishōjin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taishōjin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} (spiritual essence) of Taishōjin is identified as {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}}.
Taishōjin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taishōjin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taishōjin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|trees|ja|樹木}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taishōjin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.
As a sovereign deity, disputes such as {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as {{ill|savings|ja|貯蓄}}, {{ill|construction|ja|建築}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.
The direction of Taishōjin corresponds to the position of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} for the respective year.
== See Also == * {{ill|Directional Deity|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} * {{ill|Yin Jiao (deity)|ja|太歳星君}}

[[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]]
'''Taishōjin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taishōjin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} (spiritual essence) of Taishōjin is identified as {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}}.
Taishōjin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taishōjin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taishōjin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|trees|ja|樹木}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taishōjin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.
As a sovereign deity, disputes such as {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as {{ill|savings|ja|貯蓄}}, {{ill|construction|ja|建築}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.
The direction of Taishōjin corresponds to the position of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} for the respective year.
== See Also == * {{ill|Directional Deity|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} * {{ill|Yin Jiao (deity)|ja|太歳星君}}

[[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]]
'''Taishōjin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taishōjin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神|1=Taionjin}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} (spiritual essence) of Taishōjin is identified as {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}}.
Taishōjin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taishōjin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taishōjin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|trees|ja|樹木}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taishōjin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.
As a sovereign deity, disputes such as {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as {{ill|savings|ja|貯蓄}}, {{ill|construction|ja|建築}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.
The direction of Taishōjin corresponds to the position of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} for the respective year.
== See Also == * {{ill|Directional Deity|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} * {{ill|Yin Jiao (deity)|ja|太歳星君}}
{{Japan-culture-stub}} {{Myth-stub}}

[[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]]
'''Taishōjin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taishōjin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神|1=Taionjin}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} (spiritual essence) of Taishōjin is identified as {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}}.
Taishōjin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taishōjin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taishōjin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|trees|ja|樹木}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taishōjin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.
As a sovereign deity, disputes such as {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as {{ill|savings|ja|貯蓄}}, {{ill|construction|ja|建築}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.
The direction of Taishōjin corresponds to the position of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} for the respective year.

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵== See Also ==" to "== See Also =="
revision.text:
[[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]]
'''Taishōjin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taishōjin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神|1=Taionjin}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} (spiritual essence) of Taishōjin is identified as {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}}.
Taishōjin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taishōjin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taishōjin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|trees|ja|樹木}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taishōjin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.
As a sovereign deity, disputes such as {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as {{ill|savings|ja|貯蓄}}, {{ill|construction|ja|建築}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.
The direction of Taishōjin corresponds to the position of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} for the respective year.== See Also == * {{ill|Directional Deity|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} * {{ill|Yin Jiao (deity)|ja|太歳星君}}

[[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]]
'''Taishōjin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taishōjin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神|1=Taionjin}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} (spiritual essence) of Taishōjin is identified as {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}}.
Taishōjin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taishōjin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taishōjin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|trees|ja|樹木}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taishōjin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.
As a sovereign deity, disputes such as {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as {{ill|savings|ja|貯蓄}}, {{ill|construction|ja|建築}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.
The direction of Taishōjin corresponds to the position of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} for the respective year.== See Also == * {{ill|Directional Deity|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} * {{ill|Yin Jiao (deity)|ja|太歳星君}}

[[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]]
'''Taishōjin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taishōjin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神|1=Taionjin}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} (spiritual essence) of Taishōjin is identified as {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}}.
Taishōjin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taishōjin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taishōjin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|trees|ja|樹木}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taishōjin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.
As a sovereign deity, disputes such as {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as {{ill|savings|ja|貯蓄}}, {{ill|construction|ja|建築}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.
The direction of Taishōjin corresponds to the position of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} for the respective year. == See Also == * {{ill|Directional Deity|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} * {{ill|Yin Jiao (deity)|ja|太歳星君}}

[[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]]
'''Taishōjin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taishōjin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神|1=Taionjin}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} (spiritual essence) of Taishōjin is identified as {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}}.
Taishōjin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taishōjin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taishōjin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|trees|ja|樹木}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taishōjin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.
As a sovereign deity, disputes such as {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as {{ill|savings|ja|貯蓄}}, {{ill|construction|ja|建築}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.

In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taishōjin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神|1=Taionjin}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} (spiritual essence) of Taishōjin is identified as {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}}.
Taishōjin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taishōjin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taishōjin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|trees|ja|樹木}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taishōjin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.

However, activities such as {{ill|savings|ja|貯蓄}}, {{ill|construction|ja|建築}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.

[[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]]
'''Taishōjin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taishōjin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神|1=Taionjin}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} (spiritual essence) of Taishōjin is identified as {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}}.
Taishōjin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taishōjin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taishōjin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|trees|ja|樹木}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taishōjin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.
As a sovereign deity, disputes such as {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as {{ill|savings|ja|貯蓄}}, {{ill|construction|ja|建築}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.
The direction of Taishōjin corresponds to the position of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} for the respective year. == See Also == * {{ill|Directional Deity|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} * {{ill|Yin Jiao (deity)|ja|太歳星君}}
{{Japan-culture-stub}} {{Myth-stub}}

[[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]]
'''Taishōjin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}}. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taishōjin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神|1=Taionjin}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地}} (spiritual essence) of Taishōjin is identified as {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来}}.
Taishōjin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taishōjin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taishōjin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|trees|ja|樹木}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taishōjin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.
As a sovereign deity, disputes such as {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟}} or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as {{ill|savings|ja|貯蓄}}, {{ill|construction|ja|建築}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.
The direction of Taishōjin corresponds to the position of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} for the respective year. == See Also == * {{ill|Directional Deity|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} * {{ill|Yin Jiao (deity)|ja|太歳星君}}

revision.text:
[[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]]
'''Taishōjin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=draft}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道|12=draft}}. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taishōjin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神|1=Taionjin|12=draft}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教|12=draft}}, the {{ill|honji|ja|本地|12=draft}} (spiritual essence) of Taishōjin is identified as {{ill|Yakushi Nyorai|ja|薬師如来|12=draft}}.
Taishōjin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星|12=draft}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季|12=draft}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taishōjin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taishōjin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|trees|ja|樹木|12=draft}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taishōjin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.
As a sovereign deity, disputes such as {{ill|lawsuits|ja|訴訟|12=draft}} or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as {{ill|savings|ja|貯蓄|12=draft}}, {{ill|construction|ja|建築|12=draft}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引|12=draft}}, {{ill|marriage|ja|結婚|12=draft}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.
The direction of Taishōjin corresponds to the position of the {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支|12=draft}} for the respective year. == See Also == * {{ill|Directional Deity|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=draft}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=draft}} * {{ill|Yin Jiao (deity)|ja|太歳星君|12=draft}}
{{Japan-culture-stub}} {{Myth-stub}} <!--Taisai Shin-->

revision.text:
{{Otheruses|陰陽道における太歳神|[[日本神話]]、[[神道]]の神|歳神}} [[画像:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|太歳神]] '''太歳神'''（たいさいしん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）のひとり。[[暦]]本によっては'''だいさい'''・'''太さい'''と書くものもある。同じ八将神の一人である[[太陰神]]の夫ともされ、[[仏教]]における[[本地仏]]は[[薬師如来]]とされる。
太歳神は、[[木星]]（歳星）の精とされ、1年の[[四季]]において万物の生成をつかさどるという。また、[[君主]]的な立場にあり、八方に影響力を持つとされる。木星の精とされることから、[[樹木]]や[[草]]に関する性格を持っており、太歳神の位置する方位に向かって、樹木や草木等を植えつけることなどは吉であるが、樹木の伐採や[[草刈り]]などは凶とされる。また、君主的な立場にある神であることから、争いごと（[[訴訟]]や談判など）や[[葬儀]]・[[解体]]などは疫災にあうとされるが、[[貯蓄]]や[[家屋]]の[[建築]]や[[リフォーム|増改築]]、[[引越し|移転]]、[[商取引]]、[[結婚]]、[[就職]]などは大吉とされる。
太歳神の在位する[[方位|方角]]は、その歳の[[十二支]]の方位と同じ方角となる。
==関連項目== *[[方位神]] *[[八将神]] *[[太歳星君]]
{{Japan-culture-stub}} {{Myth-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:たいさいしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] [[Category:木星神]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:太歳神]][[zh:太歲神]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q10941586]]
Wikidata name: Taisaijin
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
[[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]]

'''Taisaijin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taisaijin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神|1=Taionjin|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiyinjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taionjin|qq=}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], the [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji]] (spiritual essence) of Taisaijin is identified as the [[:en:Bhaisajyaguru|Medicine Buddha]].

Taisaijin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Jupiter|Jupiter]] (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Four Seasons|qq=|1=four seasons|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15637261}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taisaijin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taisaijin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|tree|ja|樹木|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/trees|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 木|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10884|lt=trees}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taisaijin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.

As a sovereign deity, disputes such as [[:en:Legal proceeding|lawsuits]] or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as [[:en:Saving|savings]], [[:en:Architecture|construction]] of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/business transactions|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 商行為|1=act of commerce|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q320276}}, [[:en:Marriage|marriage]], or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.

The direction of Taisaijin corresponds to the position of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]] for the respective year.
== See Also ==
* {{ill|Directional Deity|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional Deity|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}}
* {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}
* [[:en:Yin Jiao (deity)|Yin Jiao (deity)]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:太歳神]][[zh:太歲神]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q10941586]]
Wikidata name: Taisaijin
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
[[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]]

'''Taisaijin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]]. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taisaijin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神|1=Taionjin|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiyinjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taionjin|qq=}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], the [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji]] (spiritual essence) of Taisaijin is identified as the [[:en:Bhaisajyaguru|Medicine Buddha]].

Taisaijin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Jupiter|Jupiter]] (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Four Seasons|qq=|1=four seasons|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15637261}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taisaijin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taisaijin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|tree|ja|樹木|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/trees|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 木|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10884|lt=trees}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taisaijin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.

As a sovereign deity, disputes such as [[:en:Legal proceeding|lawsuits]] or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as [[:en:Saving|savings]], [[:en:Architecture|construction]] of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/business transactions|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 商行為|1=act of commerce|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q320276}}, [[:en:Marriage|marriage]], or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.

The direction of Taisaijin corresponds to the position of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]] for the respective year.
== See Also ==
* {{ill|Directional Deity|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional Deity|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}}
* {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}
* [[:en:Yin Jiao (deity)|Yin Jiao (deity)]]

In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], the [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji]] (spiritual essence) of Taisaijin is identified as the [[:en:Bhaisajyaguru|Medicine Buddha]].

Taisaijin is regarded as the essence of [[:en:Jupiter|Jupiter]] (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Four Seasons|1=four seasons|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15637261}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taisaijin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taisaijin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|tree|ja|樹木|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/trees|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 木|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10884|lt=trees}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taisaijin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.

As a sovereign deity, disputes such as [[:en:Legal proceeding|lawsuits]] or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as [[:en:Saving|savings]], [[:en:Architecture|construction]] of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/business transactions|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 商行為|1=act of commerce|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q320276}}, [[:en:Marriage|marriage]], or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.

[[File:God of Taisai.png|サムネイル|180px|Taishōjin]]
'''Taisaijin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|en|Onmyōdō|WD=Q1340540|lt=Onmyōdō}}. In some calendars, it is written as '''Daisai''' or '''Taisai''' (太さい). Taisaijin is also considered the husband of {{ill|Taiyinjin|ja|太陰神|1=Taionjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taiyinjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taionjin|qq=}}, another member of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|en|Buddhism|WD=Q748|lt=Buddhism}}, the {{ill|Honji suijaku|en|Honji suijaku|WD=Q3080781|lt=Honji}} (spiritual essence) of Taisaijin is identified as the {{ill|Bhaisajyaguru|en|Bhaisajyaguru|WD=Q854773|lt=Medicine Buddha}}.
Taisaijin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|en|Jupiter|WD=Q319|lt=Jupiter}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Four Seasons|1=four seasons|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15637261}}. As a monarch-like deity, Taisaijin exerts influence over all directions. Due to its association with Jupiter, Taisaijin embodies characteristics related to {{ill|tree|ja|樹木|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/trees|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 木|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10884|lt=trees}} and plants. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taisaijin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.
As a sovereign deity, disputes such as {{ill|Legal proceeding|en|Legal proceeding|WD=Q1301203|lt=lawsuits}} or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as {{ill|Saving|en|Saving|WD=Q319622|lt=savings}}, {{ill|Architecture|en|Architecture|WD=Q12271|lt=construction}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/business transactions|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 商行為|1=act of commerce|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q320276}}, {{ill|Marriage|en|Marriage|WD=Q8445|lt=marriage}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.
The direction of Taisaijin corresponds to the position of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Chinese zodiac}} for the respective year. == See Also == * {{ill|Directional Deity|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional Deity|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} * {{ill|Yin Jiao (deity)|en|Yin Jiao (deity)|WD=Q11125769|lt=Yin Jiao (deity)}}
{{Japan-culture-stub}} {{Myth-stub}}

'''Taisaijin''' (太歳神, たいさいしん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|en|Onmyōdō|WD=Q1340540|lt=Onmyōdō|1=Onmyōdō}}. Taisaijin is regarded as the essence of {{ill|Jupiter|en|Jupiter|WD=Q319|lt=Jupiter|1=Jupiter}} (Suihoshi, the Star of the Year) and is believed to govern the generation of all things throughout the {{ill|Four Seasons|ja|四季|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Four Seasons|1=four seasons|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q15637261}}. Activities such as planting trees or vegetation in the direction where Taisaijin resides are considered auspicious, while cutting trees or mowing grass in this direction is regarded as inauspicious.

As a sovereign deity, disputes such as {{ill|Legal proceeding|en|Legal proceeding|WD=Q1301203|lt=lawsuits|1=Legal proceeding}} or negotiations, as well as funerals and demolitions, are thought to invite misfortune. However, activities such as {{ill|Saving|en|Saving|WD=Q319622|lt=savings|1=Saving}}, {{ill|Architecture|en|Architecture|WD=Q12271|lt=construction|1=Architecture}} of houses, renovations, relocations, {{ill|business transactions|ja|商取引|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/business transactions|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 商行為|1=act of commerce|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q320276}}, {{ill|Marriage|en|Marriage|WD=Q8445|lt=marriage|1=Marriage}}, or employment are considered highly auspicious when performed in Taishōjin’s direction.
